description: You are configuring a shared Quality Assurance terminal on a precision manufacturing shop floor. Following the Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) at ~/Desktop/QA_Terminal_SOP.txt, optimize the Chrome browser for operators wearing PPE and ensure strict privacy across shifts. Delete the unauthorized personal bookmarks (ESPN, Netflix, Facebook, Twitter, Amazon, and YouTube) and organize the manufacturing bookmarks into folders on the bookmark bar named 'Metrology', 'SPC Dashboards', 'ISO & Standards', and 'Tooling'. Set the Default font size to 22, Fixed-width font to 20, and Minimum font size to 16. Enable 'Force Dark Mode for Web Contents' in chrome://flags. Configure the browser to clear cookies and site data upon closing, disable password saving, and create a custom search engine with the keyword 'mcmaster' pointing to 'https://www.mcmaster.com/find/%s'. Set the download location to /home/ga/Documents/CMM_Reports and ensure the browser asks where to save each file before downloading.
